chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-3147 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.10.2025 Mr. Rajesh Kumar Khagaija, advocate for the petitioners --------- Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition as he seeks available another remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, the petition stands dismissed as not pressed and not maintainable. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
